nodes.label: Uzzi
nodes.description: The son of Bukki, and a descendant of Aaron (1 Chr. 6:5, 51; Ezra 7:4).

nodes.label: Meraioth
nodes.description: Father of Amariah, a high priest of the line of Eleazar (1 Chr. 6:6, 7, 52).

verses.text: And Uzzi begat Zerahiah, and Zerahiah begat Meraioth,
Bukki his son, Uzzi his son, Zerahiah his son,
And Azariah the son of Hilkiah, the son of Meshullam, the son of Zadok, the son of Meraioth, the son of Ahitub, the ruler of the house of God;
The son of Zerahiah, the son of Uzzi, the son of Bukki,
Seraiah the son of Hilkiah, the son of Meshullam, the son of Zadok, the son of Meraioth, the son of Ahitub, was the ruler of the house of God.
